headline: Sirius XM (SIRI) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Sirius XM (SIRI) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +3.45% and +0.89%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
